items.author: Basketball Poetry
items.body_excerpt: I have seen the future, and it is good. One of the many reasons Vegas Summer League is so delightful is that you never know who will pop. Everyone expected AJ Dybantsa and Darryn Peterson to have cool moments (and they certainly did!), but no one was ready for Noah Penda’s fancy…
